description_long: This is a modern pontoon-style yacht with a flat, rectangular hull and a spacious open deck. The yacht features a prominent black canopy supported by metal frames, providing shade over the central seating and helm area. The deck is surrounded by metal railings for safety, and there are multiple cushioned seating areas arranged along the perimeter and at the bow. At the stern, an outboard motor is mounted, indicating the vessel is powered and suitable for leisurely cruising. The hull is primarily white with black and gray accent lines, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The overall design emphasizes comfort, social space, and ease of access, making it ideal for urban waterfronts or marinas.
description: A sleek, modern pontoon yacht with a flat hull, open deck, black canopy, and cushioned seating, finished in white with black accents.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the outboard motor, entry ladder, and the back seating area under the canopy.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the long, flat hull, black accent stripe, and the full length of the canopy and railings.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the rounded bow, forward seating area, and the open, inviting deck layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile with clear visibility of the helm, seating arrangement, and the supporting structure for the canopy.
attribute_hull_design: Flat-bottomed monohull with squared-off stern and rounded bow, featuring black accent stripes along the sides and a white primary color. The hull is wide and stable, typical of pontoon designs, with no visible keels or chines.
attribute_deck_layout: Single-level open deck with perimeter railings, a central helm station under a black canopy, multiple cushioned seating areas at the bow and stern, and an entry ladder at the rear. The deck is spacious and designed for socializing, with clear walkways and easy access throughout.
attribute_cabin_structure: No enclosed cabin is visible; the structure consists of an open deck with a canopy supported by metal frames. There are no visible windows or doors, and the design is open-air with only seating and helm features.
